speaker: Solen
text: Do you know how long I have waited in this world? Not lived in it. Waited. Drifting between timelines like smoke. No body. No anchor. Just... awareness. Watching everything decay.

speaker: Solen
text: I am saying that the rift did not bring you here by accident. I opened it. I chose you.

speaker: Solen
text: Specifically -- two people young enough to still believe in things. Strong enough to survive the timelines. And connected enough to each other that neither would give up.

speaker: Solen
text: I needed vessels. Not bodies -- power. The kind that builds up in people who fight, who suffer, who choose each other despite everything.

speaker: Solen
text: You have been generating it since the moment you arrived. Every battle. Every bridge. Every time one of you refused to let the other fall.

speaker: Solen
text: I was. Toward here. I needed you to reach this room. Together. The convergence point -- where both timelines touch.

speaker: Mira
text: The Demon King. You told us the Demon King was the threat. You made us fight toward this room to stop --

speaker: Solen
text: There is no Demon King. There never was. There is only me. And what I intend to become.

speaker: Ren
text: Then you are the enemy we were supposed to stop.

speaker: Solen
text: I am the inevitable end of a man who waited too long to be anything else.

speaker: Solen
text: I am sorry. Genuinely. You deserved better than to be instruments. But I have been nothing for so long. And you -- you burned so bright.
